label: 501 to 517 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 91–513, title III, § 1101(a)(10)84 Stat. 1292Oct. 27, 1970
notes: Sections, , , , provided for licensing and control of the manufacture of all narcotic drugs and was known as the “Narcotic Manufacturing Act of 1960”. Sections 1 to 3 and 5 to 22 of said were classified respectively to sections 501, 501 notes, and 502 to 517 of this title. was classified to sections 4702, 4731, and 4731 note of Title 26, Internal Revenue Code. See section 801 et seq. of this title.Pub. L. 86–42974 Stat. 55Pub. L. 86–429Section 4 of Pub. L. 86–429Apr. 22, 1960
